concerns.text: The inconsistency‑detection requirement (FR‑004) lists p‑value and effect‑size discrepancy rules but omits any check on reported sample sizes. The original idea’s methodology explicitly states that a summary should be flagged when the reported sample size differs from the extracted counts by more than 5 % (see the ‘sample‑size discrepancy’ clause in the idea). Add a functional requirement (e.g., FR‑XXX) that flags such sample‑size mismatches and excludes those entries from the aggregate prevalence estimate.
